sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85139" key="poluo/neiros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολυ-όνειρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n85139.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">producing many dreams,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἡ τῶν μελαγχολικῶν [κρᾶσις] π.</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.437f</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
